items.title: How this bus stop that hasn't changed cost a city almost $9m

children.content: Repeated failed attempts to shift this bus stop has cost ratepayers millions over the past 15 years. The council is now trying again, but some warn it is already "a dog's breakfast".

items.title: So much for the promise that Tasmanians deserve better from politicians

children.content: After last year's snap election, Tasmania's premier declared voters were "sick and tired of the political games". After this week, it is clear that the politicians just cannot help themselves.

items.title: US rebuked over 'climate change' controversy at Antarctic meeting

children.content: The US has been criticised over its reluctance to refer to "climate change" at a major Antarctic meeting, with France describing it as a "dangerous precedent" that risks undermining science.

items.title: When US troops arrived during World War II, Aussies were soon 'kicking the hell out of them'

items.title: Europe swelters as more heat records set to tumble
